title: Pan-Seared Duck Breasts with Australian Pasta
description: A savory and rich dish combining the flavors of pan-seared duck breasts with Australian-inspired pasta. This recipe is perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: Season the duck breasts with salt and black pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of Australian olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck breasts for 3-4 minutes per side, or until a thermometer reads 135°F.
Remove the duck from the skillet and set aside to rest.
Cook the garlicky pasta according to the package instructions.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of Australian olive oil.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Stir in the fresh thyme and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the garlic-thyme mixture.
Serve the pan-seared duck breasts on top of the pasta.
